questions.statement:
<p>In the following question, select the related letters from the given alternatives.</p>
EAR : KUX :: AIM : ?

In a certain code language, &ldquo;CAUTIOUS&rdquo; is written as &ldquo;CUAITUOS&rdquo;, and &ldquo;DEADLINE&rdquo; is written as &ldquo;DAELDNIE&rdquo;. How will &ldquo;ECONOMIC&rdquo; be written in that language?

<p>Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed at MN&nbsp;as shown below.&nbsp;</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/12/F1_SSC_Savita_30-11-23_D23.png" style="width: 165px; height: 92px;" /></p>

Seven friends A,B,C,D,E,F and G, each has a different height. A is shorter than B but taller than C. B is taller than only four others. E is taller than G but shorter than C. D is taller than B but shorter than F. Who is the tallest among all?

<p><span style="">Select the related word from the given alternatives.</span></p>

<p><span style="">Liver ∶&nbsp;Hepatology </span>∶∶<span style="">&nbsp;Human Beauty </span>∶<span style="">&nbsp;?</span></p>

<p>Select the related figure from the given alternatives.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/19/05/Analogy%20_Letter%20Based_Lakshit%20rankawat_10Q_12%20%20April%20Reviewed%2014.PNG" style="width: 306px; height: 87px;" /></p>

The second number in the given number pairs is obtained by performing certain mathematical operation(s) on the first number. The same operation(s) are followed in all the number pairs, EXCEPT one. Find that odd number pair.

<p>Select a figure amongst the four alternatives that when placed in the blank space(?) of figure X will complete the pattern. (Rotation is not allowed).</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/21/05/F1_Archana_Ravi_05.05.21_D33.1.png" style="width: 120px; height: 120px;" /></p>
